## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pnpm -r lint && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test`
- [ ] I added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects a publishable package
- [ ] I did NOT introduce company-specific identifiers (CDS / okestro / ceph / internal domains)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
